metadata.data_sources: DefiLlama, Messari, CoinMarketCap, CoinGecko, Sui Documentation, Staking Rewards
metadata.note: Sui is a Move-based L1 with low absolute fee revenue. Revenue model = gas fees + storage fees → validators. Most staker APR is inflationary subsidy, minimal real yield from fees.

q4_2024.notes: Q4 2024 marked ATH for quarterly fees, driven by surge in SUI price (131.5% QoQ) and real fee volume growth (127.9% QoQ in SUI terms)

q1_2025.notes: Transaction fee decreased 13.1% QoQ from Q4 2024. Market cap declined 40.3% QoQ to $7.2B (price weakness)

q3_2025.notes: Fee decreased further QoQ; extremely low per-transaction fees are Sui's competitive advantage

revenue_metrics.revenue_model: gas_fees + storage_fees → validators; no protocol treasury revenue

fee_breakdown.computation_gas: Units-based pricing per operation; variable by transaction type
fee_breakdown.storage_gas: Fixed at 76 MIST per storage unit; ~100 units per byte
fee_breakdown.storage_rebate: 99% of storage fee refunded on data deletion; 1% non-refundable

current_staking_metrics.staking_note: ~75% of SUI supply staked across 100+ validators

reward_composition.subsidy_ratio_note: Estimated: ~92% of rewards from inflationary subsidy, ~8% from actual gas fees (highly inflationary)
reward_composition.subsidy_source: 10% token allocation (1B SUI tokens) for stake rewards
reward_composition.subsidy_schedule: Decreases 10% per epoch cycle, repeats for ~10 epochs before stepping down further
reward_composition.subsidy_depletion: Subsidies are temporary; long-term staking yield will be 100% gas fees only

inflation_impact.inflation_note: Network prints ~1.1M SUI daily (~406M/year) during subsidy phase until cap reached
inflation_impact.long_term_note: Maximum supply 10B SUI; current circulation ~4B; subsidies designed to deplete before supply cap

real_yield_assessment.real_yield_note: At 2% gross APR with 92% subsidy composition, real yield from fees ≈ 0.16% APR (8% of 2%)
real_yield_assessment.maturity_yield_outlook: As subsidy depletes, real yield approaches zero unless transaction volume & fees surge

tvl_and_defi.tvl_note: Hit $1B in Q4 2024, reached $2B by Jan 2025, peaked at $2.6B in Oct 2025, dipped to $1.4B in July amid market weakness

tvl_p_ratio.note: TVL/MC = $2.6B / $3.68B = 0.71 (healthy for L1; suggests reasonable collateralization)

peers.name: Solana
peers.tvl_note: TVL recently surpassed $10B; ~3.8x larger than Sui
peers.fee_model: Per-transaction variable; much higher than Sui on average

peers.name: Aptos
peers.tvl_note: Fastest-growing L1 in RWA segment; specific TVL not captured but shows strong RWA traction

peers.name: Sei
peers.tvl_note: Emerging L1; lower TVL than Sui

peers.name: Near
peers.tvl_note: Sharding L1; comparable to Sui in scale

sui_competitive_position.tvl_rank_vs_peers: Below Solana, above Sei/Near/Aptos in TVL magnitude
sui_competitive_position.fee_advantage: Lowest per-transaction fees among peers; Sui ~$0.009 vs Solana ~$0.00025 (Solana lower but variable)
sui_competitive_position.staking_differentiation: Sui has high staking ratio (75%) but mostly inflationary; Solana & Aptos have lower subsidy % of rewards

valuation_metrics.p_s_ratio_notes: Cannot compute traditional P/S due to ultra-low revenue. Q4 2024 fees annualized (~$21.6M) gives P/S = 170x (extremely high)
valuation_metrics.p_tvl_ratio_analysis: MC/TVL = $3.68B / $2.6B = 1.41x; healthy for L1; Ethereum ~0.5x, Solana ~1.7x for reference
valuation_metrics.valuation_assessment: Sui is priced for growth. Real fee revenue is negligible (~0.16% staker APR). Token value driven by expectations of: (a) TVL growth, (b) future transaction volume surge, (c) speculative demand for L1 ecosystem.

risk_factors.inflationary_subsidy_risk: 92% of staker rewards are inflationary; massive dilution if holders stake expecting real yield
risk_factors.fee_revenue_cliff: When subsidies deplete (2-4 years), staking APR will collapse to ~0.16% unless transaction fees surge 100x+
risk_factors.tvl_volatility: TVL swung from $2.6B (Oct 2025) to $1.4B (July 2025); ecosystem remains volatile
risk_factors.security_incidents: Scallop DeFi exploit ($150K on Apr 27, 2026) shows early-stage protocol risks
risk_factors.token_unlock_risk: 42.62M SUI (~$40.4M) scheduled unlock May 1, 2026; further dilution ahead

summary.revenue_character: Sui generates minimal absolute fee revenue ($5.4M in Q4 2024 ATH). Model: users pay gas/storage fees → validators get fees + subsidy. Real yield from fees is ~0.16% APR for stakers.
summary.subsidy_vs_real_split: Current staker APR (~2%) composed of ~92% inflationary subsidy (1B SUI over 2-4 year window) + ~8% actual gas fees. Subsidy is temporary; long-term yield depends entirely on transaction volume spike.
summary.valuation_implication: P/S ratio ~170x based on annualized Q4 fees; P/TVL ratio 1.41x (reasonable). Token value is speculative bet on TVL/fee growth, not cash-flow yield. Investors are pricing in 10-100x fee growth to justify current valuation.
